title: Keep Workspace Configuration
description: Configuration schema for a Keep workspace. Place this file at the workspace root as keep.yml, keep.yaml, or keep.json.

schema_version.title: Schema Version
schema_version.description: The semantic version of the Keep configuration schema, e.g. '0.1.0'. Must be a valid semver string.

staleness.title: Staleness Thresholds
staleness.description: Controls how many days without a meaningful modification before a document is flagged as stale. Each entry corresponds to a document lifecycle status. Set days to null to disable staleness checking for that status.

draft.title: Draft Staleness
draft.description: Staleness threshold for documents with status 'draft'.

days.title: Days
days.description: Number of days before a draft document is considered stale. Accepts an integer or null. Set to null to disable.

review.title: Review Staleness
review.description: Staleness threshold for documents with status 'review'.

days.title: Days
days.description: Number of days before a review document is considered stale. Accepts an integer or null. Set to null to disable.

published.title: Published Staleness
published.description: Staleness threshold for documents with status 'published'.

days.title: Days
days.description: Number of days before a published document is considered stale. Accepts an integer or null. Set to null to disable.

canon.title: Canon Staleness
canon.description: Staleness threshold for documents with status 'canon'. Canon documents never go stale by default.

days.title: Days
days.description: Number of days before a canon document is considered stale. Accepts an integer or null. Set to null to disable.

completeness.title: Completeness Settings
completeness.description: Controls how the linter evaluates whether a document is sufficiently complete. Incomplete documents receive a soft warning, not a hard violation.

min_ratio.title: Minimum Completeness Ratio
min_ratio.description: Minimum ratio of populated recommended fields required before a document is considered complete. Value between 0 and 1.

required_fields.title: Required Fields
required_fields.description: List of frontmatter field names that must be present for a document to be considered complete. Missing fields produce an incomplete warning.

required_relations.title: Required Relations
required_relations.description: Minimum number of authored (non-auto-injected) relations a document must have to be considered complete.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: User-defined extensions that add required fields to documents of a specific kind. Each key is the extension name. Built-in extensions (genealogy, experiment) are defined by the app and do not need to be declared here.

additionalProperties.title: Extension Definition
additionalProperties.description: Defines additional required and optional fields for documents matching the applies_when predicate.

applies_when.title: Applies When
applies_when.description: Predicate that determines which documents this extension applies to. Currently only kind-based matching is supported.

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: The document kind this extension applies to, e.g. 'recipe' or 'person'.

additional_required.title: Additional Required Fields
additional_required.description: Field names that are required for documents matching this extension. Missing fields produce a schema validation failure.

fields.title: Field Definitions
fields.description: Definitions for all fields contributed by this extension, both required and optional. Each key is the field name.

additionalProperties.title: Field Definition
additionalProperties.description: Type constraints for a single extension field.

type.title: Field Type
type.description: The data type of this field. Supported values: 'string', 'isodate'. Use 'isodate' for ISO 8601 date strings (YYYY-MM-DD).

enum.title: Allowed Values
enum.description: If present, restricts the field value to one of these strings.
